summary: Implementation review approved for GH-103 at head aa6f923112aef59f7c6f865422ce074fa460dcba. Local merge-ready attempt `GH-103-merge-ready-40eb9c5c841d-d8a5ceb25a9b` exposed retained validation-summary drift; this carrier-only sync fixes the retained summary to match the review records before rerunning merge-ready.
